summary: Limited details on the performance, but a solid 4‑star rating suggests an enjoyable opening set during the Dylan tour.

No specific comments about sound quality, song execution, or individual musicians are given, so the recording’s merits remain unclear beyond the reviewer’s generally positive 4‑star rating.
